login.title: Sign in to your shop
login.store_visitor_hint: Shop customer? Visit the storefront subdomain directly, e.g.
login.lookup_modal_desc: Enter the email you signed up with — we'll tell you which subdomain owns this shop.
login.lookup_not_found: No shop found for this email. Double-check the address, or open a new shop at /create.
login.lookup_rate_limited: Too many requests — please try again in a moment.
login.subdomain_body_1: This domain is the storefront — it's for customers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today's revenue, active users, and upstream balance at a glance
dashboard.low_balance_warn: ⚠️ Wholesale balance is below {threshold} (currently {current}). Top up soon to avoid blocking paid customers.

onboarding.step1_desc: Pick where your relay forwards API calls

step1.intro: Pick how customers' /v1/messages actually reaches an upstream.
step1.intro_byok_tail: lets you fully control the upstream.
step1.rec_bullet_3: Top up the platform wholesale balance = inventory
step1.rec_bullet_4: Each sale deducts face value from your balance — no provider deals
step1.byok_title: I have my own API key (BYOK)
step1.byok_subtitle: Anthropic / OpenAI / your own relay — you take the wheel.
step1.byok_bullet_1: Negotiate your own providers, set your own costs
step1.byok_bullet_2: Top up the upstream API key yourself (your money)
step1.byok_bullet_3: You own outages, price hikes, bans
step1.byok_bullet_4: Multi-key rotation / protocol shims — baked in

step3.intro: We pre-seeded 4 standard plans. Toggle them here, or jump to
step3.no_plans: No plans found (DB may not be seeded).

step4.note: Payments wiring is handled by the payments agent. If you haven't received those two routes yet, skip this step — it won't block the main flow.
step4.save_warn: Backend payment endpoint isn't live yet (payments agent is shipping it). You can skip this step for now:

step5.title: Your shop is live
step5.subtitle: Share this link — customers can sign up and order right away.
step5.next_step_finance_prefix: Top up your wholesale balance in
step5.next_step_users_tail: and share them in your target communities

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Subscription and token-pack offerings for your customers (dual-track billing)
plans.empty_subscription: No subscription plans yet — click "+ New plan" to create one, or finish the
plans.empty_token_pack: No token packs yet — click "+ New plan" to create one (one-time balance, no expiry), or finish the
plans.billing_sub_desc: Renews each cycle; expires if not renewed
plans.remove_confirm: Unlist plan "{name}"? Existing orders are not affected.

channels.title: Upstream channels
channels.subtitle: Multi-protocol routing · multi-key rotation · one-click connection test
channels.empty_hint_tail: — or pick the "Recommended" hero card to enable llmapi.pro wholesale.
channels.select_hint: Select a channel on the left to view / edit details

system_setting.title: System settings
system_setting.subtitle: Signup switch / maintenance mode / banner announcement (per tenant)
system_setting.signup_desc: When off, new end users can't sign up on your storefront. Existing users are unaffected.
system_setting.maint_desc: When on, both the storefront and /v1/messages return 503 — only the admin console stays reachable. Use sparingly.
system_setting.maint_confirm: ⚠ Enabling maintenance mode will block all end-user requests with 503. Continue?
system_setting.announce_desc: Show one banner on the storefront homepage (visible to end users). Leave empty to disable.
system_setting.announce_placeholder: e.g. "Maintenance window Tue 02:00–04:00 UTC" — leave empty to hide

payment_config.title: Payment settings
payment_config.subtitle: Manage Alipay / USDT and other end-user payment options (tenant-isolated; secrets masked server-side)
payment_config.alipay_card_desc_post: , configure the RSA2 key pair, then paste the values here. The private key is masked once saved — pasting a new value will overwrite it.
payment_config.private_key_unsaved: Unsaved. Click Save to submit, or Revert to discard.
payment_config.usdt_card_desc: Paste your TRC20 / ERC20 address. Once set, orders show a QR + wait for on-chain confirmation.

create_panel.title: Open a free shop
create_panel.auto_subdomain_desc: You can rename it later in admin, or bind your own domain via CNAME.
create_panel.tos_prefix: By clicking "Create shop" you agree to our
create_panel.done_subtitle: Signed in automatically. Redirecting to the admin console…
create_panel.done_note_1_post: (this root domain — right where you are)
create_panel.done_note_3: · Want your own domain? Bind a CNAME in settings (shipping in v0.2)
create_panel.disabled_body_pre: This panel is running in private mode. Operators can set

header.signup_paused_title: Signups are paused for this shop
header.maintenance_body: We're doing some maintenance — parts of the site may be unavailable.

pricing.title: Pick your plan
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription or a one-time token pack — pick what fits you.
pricing.empty: The shop owner hasn't set up plans yet. Check back soon.
pricing.section_sub_desc: Renew each cycle · steady daily use
pricing.section_pack_desc: One purchase · flexible · used until empty
pricing.faq_api_q: How do I use the API?
pricing.faq_api_a_1: Any client that speaks the Anthropic Messages API — Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue, the official SDK — works out of the box.
pricing.faq_api_a_4: key we issued in the Authorization header. See the
pricing.faq_topup_a: Alipay QR, USDT-TRC20, and USDT-ERC20 are all supported. Renew manually before expiry to avoid service interruption.
pricing.faq_refund_a: Unused / within 7 days → full refund. Already-consumed tokens are deducted pro rata. See the terms or contact the shop owner.
pricing.faq_quota_a: Billed per token (input + output). API keys share the account-level subscription balance; you can cap per key to prevent misuse.
pricing.faq_contact_a: Email the shop owner directly, or check Dashboard → Account for contact details.

plan_card.no_month_limit: No monthly cap — use at your own pace

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.no_sub_hint: Buy a plan to unlock daily check-in. A 7-day streak gets a bonus.
checkin.checked_already: Already checked in today. Tomorrow you get
checkin.msg_already: Already checked in today — come back tomorrow

marketing_pricing.hero_title: Open your own Claude relay shop in 30 minutes
marketing_pricing.hero_body_pre: Zero inventory — no provider deals, no buying API keys. 3api ships with
marketing_pricing.hero_body_post: baked in. Profit = your retail price − wholesale. The platform takes no cut.
marketing_pricing.cta_create: Sign up free, open a shop →
marketing_pricing.compare_title: Why pick 3api over rolling your own new-api?
marketing_pricing.compare_subtitle_pre: You could also self-deploy new-api, but a few things you can't escape. Below is the short version (the full 25-row matrix is in
marketing_pricing.compare_row1_newapi: ✅ Bring your own Anthropic / OpenAI keys
marketing_pricing.compare_row2_newapi: Days to weeks (sourcing keys + tuning pools)
marketing_pricing.compare_row3_newapi: You do (waking up at 3am to swap a base)
marketing_pricing.compare_footnote: BYOK is supported too — run llmapi wholesale + your own keys side by side with priority + auto failover.
marketing_pricing.plans_subtitle: These four tiers are platform face value (reseller cost). The retail price set in each shop is the profit lever.
marketing_pricing.profit_explain: Markup multiplexing = profit. e.g. buy Pro at face ¥29 and list it for ¥39 → ¥10/sale; list at ¥59 → ¥30/sale. The margin is yours to set.
marketing_pricing.footer: Powered by 3API Panel · Open source under MIT
